zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Cumming of Altyre於1470年出生在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾阿爾爾 豪斯時，他的父親Sir Thomas Lord of Altyre Comyn Knight31歲，母親Margaret Gordon25歲。他於1492年與Lady Jannet Browne在英國英格蘭素斯 越可爾威爾斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1550年在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾埃爾金享年80歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Cumming of Altyre于1470年出生在苏格兰艾爾金爾阿爾爾 豪斯时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Lord of Altyre Comyn Knight31岁，母亲Margaret Gordon25岁。他于1492年与Lady Jannet Browne在英国英格兰素斯 越可爾威爾斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1550年在苏格兰艾爾金爾埃爾金享年80岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Cumming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

variants.name: Cowman
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of   Cumming  .

variants.name: Coman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Romanian Vasile, Cornel, Mihaela, Nicolae, Sorin, Viorel.
Irish (Tipperary and Waterford): shortened form of Mac Cuimín or Ó Cuimín, see Cumming .

variants.name: Cummings
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of Cumming , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Common
meanings: nickname from Middle English comen, Old English cuman ‘guest, stranger, newcomer’.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Cumming of Altyre was born in 1470, in Altyre House, Elginshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Thomas Lord of Altyre Comyn Knight, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Gordon, was 25. He married Lady Jannet Browne in 1492, in Wales, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1550, in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland, at the age of 80, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Cumming of Altyre est né en 1470, à Altyre House, Elginshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Thomas Lord of Altyre Comyn Knight, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Gordon, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Jannet Browne en 1492, à Wales, South Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1550, à Elgin, Elginshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Cumming of Altyre 1470 in Altyre House, Elginshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Lord of Altyre Comyn Knight 31 und seine Mutter Margaret Gordon 25. Er hat 1492 in Wales, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Jannet Browne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1550 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Cumming of Altyre è nato il nel 1470 nel Altyre House, Elginshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Lord of Altyre Comyn Knight, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Gordon, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Jannet Browne nel 1492, nel Wales, South Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1550, nel Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Cumming of Altyreが1470年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアアルトイア ホーウゼで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Lord of Altyre Comyn Knightは31歳，母Margaret Gordonは25歳であった。1492年にイギリスイギリスソウス ヨークシュアイアワレスでLady Jannet Browneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1550年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアエルジンで80歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Cumming of Altyre(이)가 1470년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 알티어 허스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Lord of Altyre Comyn Knight(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Gordon(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1492년 영국 잉글랜드 소우스 요르크실르 월스에서 Lady Jannet Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1550년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 엘긴에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Jannet Browne em 1492, em Wales, South Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Cumming of Altyre родился в 1470 г. в местности алтир хоус, элгиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Lord of Altyre Comyn Knight было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Gordon, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jannet Browne в 1492 г. в местности веилесь, соут еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1550 г. в местности элгин, элгиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.
